name: OpenWatchParty (Develop)
description: Watch movies together in sync with friends on Jellyfin
overview: Rolling development build of OpenWatchParty, rebuilt automatically from the develop branch. Unstable — for testers only.

versions.changelog:
fix(plugin): exclude Jellyfin Web/JMP sessions from the host-bridge picker

Sessions running JellyfinWeb or JellyfinMediaPlayer already run the
injected OWP script and can host a room via the normal Create Room button,
so listing them in HostFromAnotherDevice was just clutter (and risked
a confusing double-connection if someone bridged one anyway). Filter them
out of HostBridgeManager.GetEligibleSessions(), leaving only genuine
native-client candidates like Fladder.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
